truck_number.description: Truck on this dispatch that the driver is assigned to

driver_name.description: Snapshot of driver name at time of assignment

assigned_by_access_code_id.description: Access code ID of the admin/company owner who assigned the driver

assigned_by_code_type.description: Type of user who assigned the driver

assigned_datetime.description: When the driver was assigned (ISO datetime)

active_flag.description: Whether this assignment is the active driver for this dispatch/truck

receipt_confirmed_flag.description: Whether the assigned driver has confirmed receipt of this dispatch assignment

receipt_confirmed_at.description: When the assigned driver confirmed receipt (ISO datetime)

receipt_confirmed_by_name.description: Snapshot of driver name at time of receipt confirmation
